hypothesis: If STR-Bamba's multimodal encoder-decoder pretraining successfully aligns seven molecular representations into a unified latent space, then the latent embeddings will cluster meaningfully by molecular properties, enable accurate cross-representation translation among SMILES/SELFIES/InChI/IUPAC/etc., and yield high-accuracy downstream property predictions across MoleculeNet, polymer, and electrolyte datasets, because the training objectives enforce representation alignment and reconstruction across modalities.
